Test Description: Verifies DMA register default values and performs write-read checks across a defined register list using six data patterns. Aggregates failures and signals pass/fail via finish().
Remarks: Skips addresses with read_mask==0 or write_mask==0; also skips addresses flagged in skip_array; uses patterns: 0xffffffff, 0xaaaaaaaa, 0x55555555, 0x00000000, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xffff0000.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Default value check: For each i with read_mask_array[i] != 0: PASS if read_reg(addr_array[i]) == default_value_array[i]; else count def_fail_cnt and print failure.\nWrite-read check: For each data pattern and each i not skipped and with write_mask_array[i] != 0 and read_mask_array[i] != 0: PASS if read_reg(addr_array[i]) == ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); else count wr_fail_cnt and print failure.\nFinal result: PASS if (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0) leading to finish(0); FAIL otherwise leading to finish(1).
